patches_modified.name: Free in-app purchases
patches_modified.description: Patches the Google Play Billing bridge to report success and validate purchases. Handles crystal packs and other IAP items at the billing layer. For unlocking tribes and skins, use the 'Unlock all tribes' patch instead.

patches_modified.name: Unlock all tribes
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all 20 tribes (Xinxi, Imperius, Bardur, Oumaji, Kickoo, Hoodrick, Luxidoor, Vengir, Zebasi, Aimo, Aquarion, Elyrion, Polaris, Magma, Yadakk, Quetzali, Cymanti, Swamp, Ikarus, Urkaz) and all skins by patching the native IL2CPP library (libil2cpp.so). Makes IsProductUnlocked return true, skips the purchase flow, and suppresses the 'Purchase error' dialog. Pure ARM64 hex patching, no smali, no extension.

patches_added.name: Login Fix
patches_added.description: Bypasses verification bans by spoofing signatures, installers, and faking GMS checks. REQUIRED: You must manually install microG-RE for Play Integrity to pass.

patches_removed.name: SMS Verification Bypass
patches_removed.description: Bypasses SMS verification bans by spoofing signatures, installers, and hiding GMS. REQUIRED: You must manually install microG-RE for Play Integrity to pass.

patches_added.name: Restyle Search/Games tab icons to Tools/About
patches_added.description: Overrides the native Search/Games bottom-nav icons with the Modx Tools/About artwork.

patches_added.name: Restyle Search/Games tab labels to Tools/About
patches_added.description: Renames the native Search/Games tab labels to Tools/About.

patches_removed.name: Restyle Search/Games tabs to Tools/About
patches_removed.description: Renames the native Search/Games tab labels to Tools/About and swaps their bottom-nav icons to match the repurposed extension screens.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks local Proton VPN premium  features.

patches_modified.name: Dark mode
patches_modified.description: Force dark mode for Amazon Shopping.

patches_modified.name: Disable search suggestions tracking
patches_modified.description: Prevents search keypress and focus events from being sent with suggestion requests.

patches_modified.name: Disable video autoplay
patches_modified.description: Prevents product and ad videos from autoplaying.

patches_modified.name: Fix Amazon manifest conflicts
patches_modified.description: Updates shared Amazon permissions so other Amazon apps can coexist.

patches_modified.name: Hide Rufus tab
patches_modified.description: Removes the Rufus AI assistant tab from Amazon's bottom navigation bar.

patches_modified.name: Open links in browser
patches_modified.description: Opens non-Amazon URLs in the default browser instead of the in-app WebView.

patches_modified.name: Price history charts
patches_modified.description: Injects Keepa and CamelCamelCamel price history charts on Amazon product pages.

patches_modified.name: Remove ads
patches_modified.description: Hides sponsored and ad content in Amazon Shopping via CSS injection.

patches_modified.name: Sanitize share links
patches_modified.description: Strips tracking parameters from copied/shared Amazon links, leaving only the clean product URL.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Club
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Citymapper Club Membership Note: Need to manually Purchase inside APP!.

patches_modified.name: Disable Analytics / Telemetry
patches_modified.description: Disables App Analytics / Telemetry.

patches_modified.name: Spoof WARP+ Unlimited UI
patches_modified.description: Unlocks WARP+ UI locally.

patches_modified.name: Unlock VIP
patches_modified.description: Unlocks VIP Features in app.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Ad-Free
patches_modified.description: Forces FlightAware ad-free subscribed state.

patches_modified.name: Remove ads
patches_modified.description: Disables LiveScore banner, native, and interstitial ad requests.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Drama Episodes
patches_modified.description: Bypasses the IAA (ad-watch-to-unlock) episode gate for drama mini-series.

patches_modified.name: Bypass License Check
patches_modified.description: Bypasses PairIP DRM license verification to prevent forced app shutdown on non-Play-licensed installs.

patches_modified.name: Bypass Subscription Paywall
patches_modified.description: Bypasses the subscription paywall in-app.

patches_modified.name: Remove Item Limits
patches_modified.description: Removes all  item limits in-app.

patches_modified.name: Suppress Premium Promotions
patches_modified.description: Supress all premium promotions in-app.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Followed Locations
patches_modified.description: Unlocks the Followed Locations premium feature.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Premium Features In the App.

patches_modified.name: Unlock subscription
patches_modified.description: Unlocks subscription in app

patches_modified.name: Unlock PRO
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all PRO features in app

patches_modified.description: Unlocks ColorNote premium and removes advertising ID permissions.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Enterprise
patches_modified.description: Unlocks Enterprise features in app.

patches_modified.description: Unlock premium features in app.

patches_modified.name: Unlock Premium
patches_modified.description: Unlocks all Wavve Boating GPS premium features: charts, weather, tide data, and removes subscription paywall.
